name: nypd-sergeant-study-guide
description: NYPD Sergeant Promotional Exam study guide with web app and PDF output

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:pdf
scripts.deploy: npm run build:web && cp src/index.html src/manifest.json src/sw.js docs/ && cp build/master-practice-exam.html build/quick-reference-cheat-sheet.html docs/ 2>/dev/null; git add docs/ && echo 'Ready to commit: git commit -am "Deploy update" && git push'
scripts.study: npm run export:anki && npm run schedule && open build/study-schedule.md
